description: explicit cache IDs and sharing use one aggregate disk while matching BuildKit result-key asymmetry

writes.Dockerfile:
FROM base
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/custom-one,id=custom-b,sharing=locked --mount=type=cache,target=/custom-two,id=custom-b,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'count=0; test ! -f /custom-one/count || count=$(cat /custom-one/count); count=$((count+1)); printf %s $count >/custom-two/count; mkdir -p /oracle; cp /custom-one/count /oracle/custom-count'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/explicit-alias,id=/omitted-alias,sharing=locked --mount=type=cache,target=/omitted-alias,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'printf reused >/explicit-alias/value; test "$(cat /omitted-alias/value)" = reused; printf reused >/oracle/explicit-omitted'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-1 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-2 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-3 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-4 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-5 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-6 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-7 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-8 sh -euxc 'for n in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8; do printf %s "$n" >"/cache-$n/value"; done; mkdir -p /oracle; printf eight >/oracle/eight-mounts'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/default-cache sh -euxc 'count=0; test ! -f /default-cache/count || count=$(cat /default-cache/count); count=$((count+1)); printf %s $count >/default-cache/count; mkdir -p /oracle; cp /default-cache/count /oracle/default-count'

FROM base
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/custom-one,id=custom-b,sharing=locked --mount=type=cache,target=/custom-two,id=custom-b,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'count=0; test ! -f /custom-one/count || count=$(cat /custom-one/count); count=$((count+1)); printf %s $count >/custom-two/count; mkdir -p /oracle; cp /custom-one/count /oracle/custom-count'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/explicit-alias,id=/omitted-alias,sharing=locked --mount=type=cache,target=/omitted-alias,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'printf reused >/explicit-alias/value; test "$(cat /omitted-alias/value)" = reused; printf reused >/oracle/explicit-omitted'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-1 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-2 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-3 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-4 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-5 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-6 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-7 --mount=type=cache,target=/cache-8 sh -euxc 'for n in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8; do printf %s "$n" >"/cache-$n/value"; done; mkdir -p /oracle; printf eight >/oracle/eight-mounts'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/default-cache,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'count=0; test ! -f /default-cache/count || count=$(cat /default-cache/count); count=$((count+1)); printf %s $count >/default-cache/count; mkdir -p /oracle; cp /default-cache/count /oracle/default-count'
